_comment: All-at-once study: 6 scoring constants + 4 neutral-discipline constants (phase 2 + phase 3 jointly; see tuning/PHASE3_DESIGN.md). score_w_production is PINNED at 1.0 (NOT listed). Identity defaults (reproduce current play): scoring all 1/0/0; neutral penalties 0 (neutral_payback_penalty=0, neutral_capture_penalty=0 make the gate a no-op). Neutral ranges are grounded in sampled map stats: production 1-5, neutral garrison 5-92 (p90 53), payback garrison/production 1-92 (p50 9, p90 28). score_w_ship_cost [0.7,1.5] and score_w_final_ships [0.6,1.4] are TIGHTENED around 1.0: a bisection on the correct build showed extremes (cost~0.5, final~1.7) are catastrophic (apollo over-commits / hoards), so the wide ranges just wasted trials getting pruned.
